output.summary: Two changes: (1) Change showExcerpt attribute default from false to true in block.json and example. (2) Add event cost display using _EventCost and _EventCurrencySymbol meta fields in both TSX and PHP, rendered in the Lower Group section after venue and before the external link button.

fileChanges.description: Change showExcerpt default from false to true; update example attributes
fileChanges.details: In attributes.showExcerpt, change "default": false to "default": true. In example.attributes, change "showExcerpt": false to "showExcerpt": true.

fileChanges.description: Add cost/price display from event meta fields
fileChanges.details: 1. Read _EventCost and _EventCurrencySymbol from eventMeta (same pattern as other meta fields already read on lines 141-146). 2. Add a new cost line in the Lower Group div (after venue, before external link button) that renders when cost is available. Format: '{currencySymbol}{cost}' or just '{cost}' if no symbol. Use same styling as venue/date lines: 'text-lg font-medium leading-[1.2] text-charcoal'. 3. In editor placeholder mode (displayContent), show 'Event Cost' placeholder text.

fileChanges.description: Add cost/price display from event meta fields
fileChanges.details: 1. Add two new get_post_meta calls after the existing meta reads (around line 27): $event_cost = get_post_meta($event_id, '_EventCost', true); $currency_symbol = get_post_meta($event_id, '_EventCurrencySymbol', true); 2. Build a display string: if cost is non-empty, prepend currency symbol if available. 3. Add a new paragraph element in the Lower Group section (after venue, before external link) with the same classes as the venue line: 'text-lg font-medium leading-[1.2] text-charcoal'. Wrap in conditional: if ($event_cost).

attributeChanges.name: showExcerpt
attributeChanges.description: Change default from false to true so excerpt shows by default

designDecisions.question: Where should the cost/price line appear in the Lower Group?
designDecisions.recommendation: Place it after the venue line and before the external link button, using the same text styling as the date and venue lines (text-lg font-medium leading-[1.2] text-charcoal). This keeps all event metadata visually grouped.

designDecisions.question: How should cost be formatted when currency symbol is available vs not?
designDecisions.recommendation: If _EventCurrencySymbol is set, prepend it directly to the cost value (e.g., '$25'). If only _EventCost is available with no symbol, display the cost value as-is (The Events Calendar often stores cost as a pre-formatted string like '25' or 'Free').

designDecisions.question: Should cost display when value is 0 or 'Free'?
designDecisions.recommendation: Yes, display the cost line whenever _EventCost is non-empty. TEC stores 'Free' as a string, and '0' is also a valid cost. Only hide the line when _EventCost is empty/null.
